---
title: "Week 4"
subtitle: "Trip Generation"
editor: visual
---

## Prepare

📖 Watch the [videos](/teaching/ENCI707/prep/week4/week4-videos.html)

## Participate

🖥️ [Lecture 3 - Trip Generation](/teaching/CIVE461/slides/lec-3.html)

## Practice

📋 Complete Jupyter notebooks from in-class tutorials.

<br><br>

::: {style="font-size: 0.875em;"}
Back to [course schedule](/teaching/CIVE461/ "Course schedule") ⏎
:::
